"cvss_v4": {"score": 6.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:U"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-269", "name": "Improper Privilege Management"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-345", "name": "Insufficient Verification of Data Authenticity"}], "description": "## Summary

Agent hook events could enqueue trusted system events from unsanitized external input.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

Agent hook dispatch could turn externally supplied hook metadata into trusted system events, allowing untrusted input to enter the agent as higher-trust context.

## Technical Details

The fix sanitizes hook names and marks agent hook system events as untrusted before enqueueing them.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #64372. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `e3a845bde5b54f4f1e742d0a51ba9860f9619b29`
- PR: #64372

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0019, "percentile": 0.08676}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:55:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43534"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:55:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/64372", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/e3a845bde5b54f4f1e742d0a51ba9860f9619b29", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43534", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-unsanitized-external-input-in-agent-hook-events", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Agent hook events could enqueue trusted system events from unsanitized external input", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T01:32:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7g8c-cfr3-vqqr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
